headline: Congress CUTS Hegseth's JET JUICE 💸✈️ Until BOAT BOMB VID DROPS 💥🚤
text:
Congress SIMPS 🤡📜 are THROTTLING 🛑 Pete Hegseth's TRAVEL BUDGET 💰🛫 like a bad Tinder date 😩 until PENTAGON DADDY 🏛️🔒 coughs up the UNEDITED DOUBLE-TAP 💥💥 BOAT STRIKE VID from Sept 2 🎥🚤! Trump 🍊👑 campaign's Caribbean DRUG BOAT BUSTS 🛳️💊 going BRRRRR 😤🚀 but LAWYERS 🤓⚖️ screaming ILLEGAL AF 🚫 cuz LAWS OF WAR 📜⚔️ say PICK UP WOUNDED SIMPS 🏥 not STRIKE AGAIN 💣🔥 – 9 DEAD first hit ☠️, 2 survivors CLINGING 🔥 to wreckage get ZAPPED 💀 total 11 GOOSED 🍆🕊️ per WaPo sleuths 📰🔍!

Buried in 3K-PAGE DEFENSE BEEF 📚💰 ($901BN MONSTER 🤑📈) bill – bipartisan SLAY 🥊 from Dems & GOP – caps Hegseth's office at 75% TRAVEL JUICE ☕✈️ till they HAND OVER raw FOOTAGE to armed services committees 🎥📤! Trump DENIES 🍊🚫 his own CAMS 📹 saying 'NO PROBLEM' to ABC hack last WED 😏 – 'I DIDN'T SAY THAT, YOU DID 😂' – now it's 'WHATEVER PETE WANTS 🕶️👨‍💼' like flipping burgers at McD's 🥤🍔! Hegseth playing COY 😶 'REVIEWING PROCESS 🤔' while prepping BRIEF with Rubio 🕶️🇨🇺 & Joint Chiefs boss Dan Caine 👨‍✈️ for Tuesday DEBRIEF 👥🗣️!

Trump BOASTS 🗣️🍊 each SUNK DRUG BOAT 🛳️💥 SAVES 25K YANK LIVES 🛡️🇺🇸 & SEA FENTANYL FLOOD 🚫🌊 – admin claims NON-INTERNATIONAL WAR 🗡️🌍 with TRAFFICKER TERROR ORGS 🤖🛳️ but ZERO PROOF 📄🚫 on each BUST, DOZENS BODIED ☠️💀! Experts ROAST 🔥 'DOUBLE-TAP WAR CRIME? 😱' – Navy ADM Frank Bradley 🎥 showed CONGRESS CLIPS last week: Dem Jim Himes 😢 'DEEPLY TROUBLING 💔' vs. Tom Cotton 🐂🇦🇷 'LAWFUL NEEDY SLAP 💪✅'!

White House SWEARING 🤝 'ALL LEGAL 🟢⚖️' – second STRIKE was ADM CALL 📞 not Hegseth's, but FOX BOY 🦊 under FIRE 🔥 for narrative SPIN 🌀! Congress CLAMORING 📢🔥 cross-aisle for DEETS while Trump POSTED first STRIKE VID 🎥💥 but ghosts the sequel 👻🚫 – will Pete DROP the MIC 🎤 or get GROUNDED ✈️🚫 like a naughty pilot? Hegseth's wallet SWEATING 😰💦 as lawmakers YEET his FUNDS 🤑➡️🗑️ till VIDEO ORGY 💦📱 goes PUBLIC! 😂💥🚤
